sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68056" key="misokalh/meros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῑσο-κᾰλήμερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n68056.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">curmudgeonly</tr_>, Donat.ad Ter.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Adelph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">839</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">840</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
